name: reel-atlas
description: Self-hosted, single-user research catalog for Instagram reels (capture & ingest spine).

scripts.db:migrate:local: bunx wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local
scripts.db:migrate: bunx wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote
scripts.db:tables:local: bunx wrangler d1 execute DB --local --command "select name from sqlite_master where type='table'"
